title: Implement code-only authentication system with persistent login

requirements.summary: Update registration flow to automatically authenticate users after receiving their unique code
acceptanceCriteria: After registration, users are immediately logged in
Users can access chat functionality without a second login step
The unique code is stored locally for future sessions

file_operations.description: After successful user registration, automatically authenticate the user by storing their unique code and user ID in local storage, then redirect to the chat page without requiring additional login steps
Create a React context provider and hook for code-based authentication that manages login state, stores/retrieves the unique code from local storage, and provides login/logout functions

requirements.summary: Create simplified login page for returning users to authenticate with their unique code
acceptanceCriteria: Login page has a single input field for the unique code
Entering a valid code authenticates the user immediately
Works consistently across different devices and browsers
No Internet Identity or password prompt appears

file_operations.description: Create a login page with a single input field for entering the unique code, validate the code by calling the backend authenticateWithCode method, and store the authenticated user ID in local storage upon success
Add a new /login route that renders the LoginPage component, and wire it into the router configuration alongside existing routes

requirements.summary: Remove Internet Identity authentication and replace with code-based authentication checks
acceptanceCriteria: Users authenticated via unique code can access all chat features
Internet Identity login/logout UI is removed from the header
ConnectPage and ChatPage check for code-based authentication instead of Internet Identity

file_operations.description: Replace Internet Identity login/logout UI with code-based authentication status display, showing the user's logged-in state and providing a logout button that clears local storage
Replace Internet Identity authentication check with code-based authentication check using the useCodeAuth hook, redirecting unauthenticated users to the login page
Replace Internet Identity authentication check with code-based authentication check using the useCodeAuth hook, redirecting unauthenticated users to the login page
Update the call-to-action button to navigate authenticated users to the connect page and unauthenticated users to the login page, removing Internet Identity login trigger

requirements.summary: Implement persistent code-based session storage across page refreshes and browser restarts
acceptanceCriteria: User's unique code is stored in browser local storage
User remains logged in after closing and reopening the browser
Session ends only when user explicitly logs out

file_operations.description: Implement automatic session restoration on initialization by checking local storage for stored authentication data, and provide a logout function that clears local storage to end the session
Wrap the app with the CodeAuthProvider so that code-based authentication state is available throughout the application and persists across page loads
